name_en: 🌟New Arrival 🆕 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag. The Puzzle bag features a distinctive rectangular silhouette defined by geometric lines. This large version is crafted from glossy calfskin, detailed with denim-style details. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap*Zipper closure, leather zipper pull*One external zip pocket, one internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*Anagram embossing
name_cn:
🌟New Arrival 🆕 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag. The Puzzle bag features a distinctive rectangular silhouette defined by geometric lines. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap*Zipper closure, leather zipper pull*One external zip pocket, one internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*Anagram embossing
size: 33×14.7×21.5cm
Model:052500
